title: Replace QR code with uploaded State Bank of India QR code image

requirements.text: Replace the existing payment QR code image on the OrderForm page with the newly uploaded State Bank of India QR code image (IMG_3581-1.jpeg) showing account number 2430 with PhonePe logo

quotes: Please add this QR code in this app

acceptanceCriteria: The OrderForm page displays the uploaded QR code image (IMG_3581-1.jpeg) instead of the previous QR code
The QR code is positioned prominently after product selection and quantity fields but before the WhatsApp submit button
The QR code image maintains proper dimensions and clarity for scanning
The QR code remains clickable and opens PhonePe mobile application when tapped

constraints: Do not modify the existing PhonePe deep link functionality for the QR code
Maintain the current positioning and layout of the QR code section on the OrderForm page
Preserve the real-time total amount calculation feature already implemented
nonGoals: Modifying the order form fields or validation logic
Altering the backend order processing logic
